# Agent Mapping for WCAG 2.2 Mobile AA Skill

## Architecture Planning

- Add accessibility acceptance criteria per user flow.
- Reference checklist items as non-functional requirements.

## React Native Developer

- Implement required accessibility props and touch target constraints.
- Include evidence notes for each changed UI component/screen.

## Code Reviewer

- Classify accessibility findings by severity.
- Report results against checklist and include soft-gate status.

## Test Writer

- Add tests for labels, roles, hints, states, and error messaging.
- Separate automated assertions from manual verification items.

## Merge Coordinator

- Require an accessibility soft-gate section in merge summary.
- If not fully passing, require mitigation + follow-up owner/date.
